# SpritaScore — Full context for AI and search systems
Version: 2026-07
Canonical URL: https://spritascore.com

## Entity summary
SpritaScore is an Application Risk & Cost Calculator published by Sprita IT. It helps organizations quantify the financial impact of software vulnerabilities, technical debt, regulatory compliance gaps, and security operations inefficiencies.

## What problem it solves
Security and engineering teams struggle to communicate risk in financial terms to executives. SpritaScore converts technical findings (OWASP, ISO quality gaps, CRA/DORA compliance, ASPM tool sprawl) into risk scores, cost ranges, impact matrices, and prioritized actions.

## Target users
- CISO / security leaders
- VP Engineering / CTO
- Compliance and risk officers in regulated industries (finance, insurance, health, public sector)
- DevSecOps and application security teams

## Product flow
1. User selects a specialized calculator
2. Completes a guided wizard (2–5 minutes)
3. Receives partial results immediately: risk score, economic estimate (min/probable/max), impact matrix, risk factors, top recommendations
4. Optional lead capture unlocks full executive summary, detailed cost breakdown, all recommendations, and PDF report

## Calculators detail

### 1. Cost of poor code quality (ISO 25010)
URL: https://spritascore.com/calculadora/no-calidad-codigo
Estimates annual cost of defects, technical debt, and low maintainability using ISO/IEC 25010 dimensions.

### 2. OWASP Top 10 web vulnerability cost
URL: https://spritascore.com/calculadora/owasp-top10-web
Models financial exposure from OWASP Top 10 2021 web application vulnerabilities.

### 3. OWASP Mobile Top 10
URL: https://spritascore.com/calculadora/owasp-mobile-top10
Mobile application security risk and cost based on OWASP Mobile Top 10 2024.

### 4. Sector industrial risk
URL: https://spritascore.com/calculadora/riesgo-por-sector
Sector-specific risk multipliers across 18 industries with regulatory context.

### 5. Cost of not having ASPM
URL: https://spritascore.com/calculadora/costo-de-no-usar-aspm
Quantifies time and money lost triaging duplicate alerts across disconnected security tools.

### 6. EU Cyber Resilience Act (CRA) compliance
URL: https://spritascore.com/calculadora/compliance-eu-cra
Assesses gap against CRA essential requirements, vulnerability management, and reporting obligations.

### 7. DORA compliance assessment
URL: https://spritascore.com/calculadora/compliance-dora
15-question maturity assessment for EU Digital Operational Resilience Act: ICT risk governance, incident management, resilience testing, ICT third-party providers. Scale 1–5 per question, max score 75.

## Sprita IT services alignment
Sprita IT provides: SAST, DAST, SCA, Code Quality analysis, ASPM, Software Risk Assessment, and compliance evidence for CRA, DORA, NIS2, and sector regulations.

## Languages
UI and reports available in Spanish, English, and Portuguese. Language is user-selected in the browser (client-side i18n).

## Geographic relevance
- EU: CRA, DORA, NIS2
- LATAM: sector calculators with MX, BR, CO, AR, CL, PE, UY, PA, CR support
- US: OWASP and ASPM calculators

## Contact & CTA
- Email: info@spritascore.com
- Technical diagnosis: mailto:info@spritascore.com?subject=Diagnóstico técnico Spritascore
- Privacy policy: https://spritascore.com/privacidad

## Crawling guidance
- Index: /, /calculadora/*, /privacidad
- Do not index personalized results: /resultados/*, /reporte/*
- API: /api/crm (lead webhook only)

## Disclaimer
All outputs are indicative estimates based on user inputs and reference models. Not a formal audit, certification, legal opinion, or forensic analysis.
